headline: Position Tracking · setup pending
standfirst: Position Tracking lets us monitor a curated keyword list daily and surface movements before they show up in Organic Rankings. The cmsfinancial.ae tracker hasn't been set up yet — the next monthly cycle will start by configuring it against the Task 9 (keyword research) commercial-keyword list.
summary_lead: This chapter activates once Task 9 (keyword research) completes. Task 9 produces the commercial keyword list, Task 10 clusters those keywords into target groups, and the resulting list seeds a 30–50 keyword Position Tracking project here. Cadence: daily Semrush check, weekly write-up below.

win_tiles.label: Blocker
win_tiles.tip: Position Tracking needs a curated keyword list. Task 9 (8h, Month 1) produces that list.

win_tiles.label: Target tracker size
win_tiles.tip: Recommended tracker size for cmsfinancial.ae's surface area: 30–50 keywords mixed across brand, commercial, and transactional intent.

win_tiles.label: Check cadence
win_tiles.tip: Position Tracking refreshes positions daily so we see lift/decline within 24 hours of a Google update.

prose.title: Why this chapter is empty right now.
paragraphs: Position Tracking is a Semrush product that monitors a curated list of keywords every day and surfaces position changes, visibility lift, and SERP-feature gains. It catches movement weeks before Organic Rankings (which refreshes monthly).

It needs a keyword list first. The Tasks 9 + 10 in the SEO Master Tasks sheet — Keyword research for commercial/transactional opportunities (8h) and Keyword clustering + content mapping (3h) — produce that list. Both are currently Not Started.
Once those ship, the next monthly cycle will configure a 30–50 keyword tracker, baseline against it, and start the weekly cadence write-up here.
